phoneticUs: 藢p忙艐kri蓹藞tekt蓹mi; 藢p忙nkri蓹藞tekt蓹mi
examples: Treatment choices include analgesic therapy, drainage, and pancreatectomy.
Objective:To value the effect of pancreatectomy on the fasting blood sugar(FBS).
The researchers wanted to investigate the presumed high perioperative risk of pancreatectomy, which has limited its use as a treatment.
